Package nonprofitbookkeeping.model.ofx

Class OfxV2Writer.InvestmentData

java.lang.Object
nonprofitbookkeeping.model.ofx.OfxV2Writer.InvestmentData
Enclosing class:
OfxV2Writer
public static class OfxV2Writer.InvestmentData extends Object
Inner class to hold data for investment account information used in OFX sections.

  • Field Summary

    Fields
    Modifier and Type
    Field
    Description
    String
    accountId
    Account ID for the investment account.
    BigDecimal
    availableCash
    Available cash balance in the investment account.
    String
    brokerId
    Broker ID for the investment account.
    String
    cashAsOf
    Reported cash balance date (defaults to dtAsOf when omitted).
    String
    currency
    Default currency for the account (e.g., "USD").
    String
    dtAsOf
    'As of' date for the investment statement data (OFX format).
    BigDecimal
    marketValue
    Current market value of the investment account.
    String
    marketValueAsOf
    Date for the reported market value (defaults to dtAsOf).
    final List<OfxV2Writer.InvestmentPosition>
    positions
    Detailed investment positions to include in the export.
    String
    severity
    Severity of the status for the statement response.
    String
    statusCode
    Status code for the statement response.
    String
    statusMessage
    Optional human readable status message.
    String
    transactionEndDate
    End date for investment transactions.
    final List<OfxV2Writer.InvestmentTransactionData>
    transactions
    Investment transactions to include in the export.
    String
    transactionStartDate
    Start date for investment transactions.
    String
    trnUid
    Transaction UID for the statement response.
